# Rhythmiq

> Rhythmiq is the AI phone host for restaurants. It answers every call 24/7, books tables, takes takeout and delivery orders, and answers guest questions in 12+ languages, sounding just like your best maitre d'. Flat pricing starts at $29 a month.

Rhythmiq is built specifically for restaurants and hospitality, not as a generic chatbot. It captures the reservations and orders that go to voicemail today, handles overflow during the dinner rush, and learns each venue's menu, hours, and policies. This file is a guide for language models to the most useful pages on rhythmiqcx.com. All URLs below are live and canonical.

## Core pages

- [Home: AI phone host for restaurants](https://rhythmiqcx.com/): What Rhythmiq does, how it answers calls, books tables, and takes orders 24/7.
- [Voice AI](https://rhythmiqcx.com/voice-ai): The voice platform behind Rhythmiq, latency, languages, and how the AI host handles real calls.
- [Pricing](https://rhythmiqcx.com/pricing): Flat monthly plans starting at $29, with no per-minute surprises.
- [Integrations](https://rhythmiqcx.com/integrations): POS, reservation, and booking systems Rhythmiq connects to.
- [Demo](https://rhythmiqcx.com/demo): Hear a live AI phone host call and try Rhythmiq.
- [About](https://rhythmiqcx.com/about-us): Who builds Rhythmiq and why.
- [Contact](https://rhythmiqcx.com/contact-us): Get in touch or book a walkthrough.

## Compare Rhythmiq to other voice AI platforms

- [Rhythmiq vs Retell AI](https://rhythmiqcx.com/retell-ai-alternative): How Rhythmiq compares as a Retell AI alternative for restaurants.
- [Rhythmiq vs Bland AI](https://rhythmiqcx.com/bland-ai-alternative): How Rhythmiq compares as a Bland AI alternative.
- [Rhythmiq vs Vapi](https://rhythmiqcx.com/vapi-alternative): How Rhythmiq compares as a Vapi alternative.
- [Rhythmiq vs Synthflow](https://rhythmiqcx.com/synthflow-alternative): How Rhythmiq compares as a Synthflow alternative.

## Free tools

- [All free tools](https://rhythmiqcx.com/tools): A library of free AI tools for restaurants, voice, and small business.
- [AI receptionist script generator](https://rhythmiqcx.com/tools/ai-receptionist-script-generator): Generate a phone-answering script for your venue.
- [AI voice agent script generator](https://rhythmiqcx.com/tools/ai-voice-agent-script-generator): Build a voice agent call flow.
- [Chatbot ROI calculator](https://rhythmiqcx.com/tools/chatbot-roi-calculator): Estimate the return on automating customer conversations.
